title: iPhone Subway Hugging Couple

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a completely RAW quality, unprocessed, unedited image with full iPhone camera quality. A subway station in USA, a momentary blur. The subway is in motion. In front of the subway, there is an elderly woman and man holding daisies. They are hugging.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Create a completely RAW quality, unprocessed, unedited image with full iPhone camera quality. A subway station in USA, a momentary blur. The subway is in motion. In front of the subway, there is an elderly woman and man holding daisies. They are hugging.

imagePrompts.title: Raw Iphone Subway Hugging Couple

prompt: Create a completely RAW quality, unprocessed, unedited image with full iPhone camera quality. A subway station in USA, a momentary blur. The subway is in motion. In front of the subway, there is an elderly woman and man holding daisies. They are hugging.
originalPrompt: Create a completely RAW quality, unprocessed, unedited image with full iPhone camera quality. A subway station in USA, a momentary blur. The subway is in motion. In front of the subway, there is an elderly woman and man holding daisies. They are hugging.

promptTranslations.zh: 生成一张完全 RAW 原生画质、未经处理、未经编辑的图像，呈现 iPhone 摄像头的真实质感。场景位于美国的地铁站，带有瞬间的动态模糊。地铁正在行驶中。在地铁前，有一位老妇人和一位老人手持雏菊，他们正在拥抱。
promptTranslations.fr: Créer une image de qualité totalement BRUTE, non traitée, non retouchée, avec la qualité d'un appareil photo iPhone. Une station de métro aux États-Unis, un flou instantané. Le métro est en mouvement. Devant le métro, une femme âgée et un homme tiennent des marguerites. Ils s'enlacent.
promptTranslations.ru: Создайте абсолютно «сырое», необработанное и неотредактированное изображение с качеством камеры iPhone. Станция метро в США, эффект легкого размытия в движении. Поезд метро находится в движении. На переднем плане пожилая женщина и мужчина держат в руках букеты ромашек. Они обнимаются.
promptTranslations.pt: Crie uma imagem com qualidade totalmente CRUA, sem processamento ou edição, com a qualidade de câmera de um iPhone. Uma estação de metrô nos EUA, um borrão momentâneo. O metrô está em movimento. Em frente ao metrô, há uma senhora e um senhor segurando margaridas. Eles estão se abraçando.
promptTranslations.ja: iPhoneのカメラで撮影したような、未加工でリアルな質感の画像。アメリカの地下鉄駅のホーム、一瞬のブレ。地下鉄が通過中。その前で、デイジーの花束を抱えた老夫婦が抱き合っている様子。
promptTranslations.ko: 아이폰 카메라로 촬영한 듯한, 보정되지 않은 날것 그대로의 RAW 품질 이미지. 미국 지하철역 배경, 찰나의 순간을 포착한 듯한 블러 효과. 달리는 지하철 앞, 데이지 꽃을 든 노부부가 서로를 껴안고 있는 모습.
